name: African Ribs with Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Broil ribs until browned.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a large pot.
3. Saute onion and garlic until tender.
4. Add chicken broth and coriander seeds. Season with salt, pepper, chili oil to taste.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Add ribs and simmer covered for 1 hour or until the ribs are tender.
7. Place peanuts in a blender with the remaining tablespoon of oil.
8. Blend until finely ground.
9. Add the ground peanuts along with eggplant, lemon juice, and paprika to the pot.
10. Simmer until the eggplant is tender, stirring occasionally.
11. Adjust salt and pepper to taste.
12. Add green beans and carrots before serving or serve vegetables alongside the stew.
Note: 1/2 cup creamy peanut butter may be substituted for roasted peanuts. Stir into sauce after the eggplant is cooked.
